title: Business roles, payment DMs, balance lookup & new /config commands
changes: Creating a business account now auto-creates a Discord role named 'Business | [name]'
Renaming a business account renames the Discord role to match
Deleting a business account deletes its Discord role
On startup, bot automatically creates roles for any existing business accounts that pre-date this feature
Dashboard economy page shows the Discord role badge next to each business account name
Business Pay Member now DMs the recipient: payment amount and business name
/give now DMs the recipient: payment amount and sender name
/balance now accepts an optional user option to check another member's balance
Added /config blacklist — configure blacklist panel channel (Premium)
Added /config civjobs — set job board channel for Civilian Jobs
Added /config sticky — shows active sticky count and Discord command usage
Added /config reactionroles — shows active reaction role messages and setup command
Added /config business — shows business account count and dashboard link
Updated /config help to list all new subcommands in their categories
